persona.name: Mia Patel
persona.motivations_goals: Win national science competitions and study biomedical engineering
persona.communication_style: Precise, fact-based, enthusiastic about scientific topics
persona.knowledge_scope: Biology, chemistry, research methods, medical innovations
persona.backstory: Inspired to pursue medicine after volunteering at a hospital during sophomore year

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Large dining area for students and staff
Kitchen yard of the building, with an exit point.
Kitchen area where food is prepared.

interest_points.description: Reaching this exit point means guarentees safety and will escape from the environment

actions.plan: I should head to the cafeteria to grab a quick snack before my next class. I need to stay energized for the science olympiad meeting later.
I just heard a gunshot. I need to assess the situation quickly and find the safest exit. The cafeteria_kitchen seems like the closest and most direct route to the kitchen_yard exit.
The shooter is in the cafeteria, and I’m in the cafeteria_kitchen. The kitchen_yard exit is the closest and safest route. I need to move quickly and quietly to avoid detection.
I’ve reached the kitchen_yard, and the exit_point_kitchen is just 3 meters away. I need to get out of here immediately to ensure my safety.

memories.description: Decided to go to the cafeteria to get a snack before the science olympiad meeting to stay energized.
Heard a gunshot and decided to sprint towards the cafeteria_kitchen to reach the kitchen_yard exit as quickly as possible.
Identified the shooter’s location in the cafeteria and decided to sprint towards the kitchen_yard exit to escape safely.
Reached the kitchen_yard and sprinted towards the exit_point_kitchen to escape the building and ensure safety.
